title: More MiCA-licensed crypto firms could exit EU market: Gate Europe CEO
summary: Gate Europe’s Giovanni Cunti says some MiCA-licensed crypto firms may struggle to sustain compliance costs as Europe enters its new regulatory era.

title: Russian parliament passes law regulating crypto market
summary: The State Duma legislation creates a regulated framework for crypto market participants and now moves to President Vladimir Putin for his signature before becoming law.

title: LA’s $1.2 Billion Graffiti Towers Cleared to Exit Bankruptcy
summary: The bankrupt $1.2 billion Oceanwide Plaza project in Los Angeles, dubbed the Graffiti Towers after taggers spray-painted the abandoned complex, has been cleared for sale and possible completion more than seven years after the original Chinese developer ran out of money.

title: Economic Momentum Flips From Blessing to Curse for S&P 500 Bulls
summary: Strong economic momentum is a double-edged sword for US equity traders. Solid growth is an earnings tailwind. But let it run too hot, and it turns from blessing to curse.

title: Jack Mallers Steps Down as CEO From Bitcoin Treasury Twenty One Capital
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Jack Mallers Steps Down as CEO From Bitcoin Treasury Twenty One Capital 
Jack Mallers has stepped down as CEO of bitcoin treasury Twenty One.

title: Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
Bitcoin miner Hut 8 has said it signed a second 15-year lease ​worth $9.8 billion for its AI data center. 
This post Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal first appeared on Bitcoin Mag

title: Galaxy Commits Up to $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for Quantum Threat
summary: The crypto firm's initiative arrives as researchers, exchanges, and the U.S. government warn that "Q-Day" may land as soon as 2030.

title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Has New Life
summary: Odds of the Clarity Act passing in 2026 jumped to 42% after a surprising new development from the White House.

title: Robinhood Chain tops $430 million in TVL, FalconX sees RWAs as the key differentiator
summary: Robinhood Chain hit $431M TVL and 250K+ daily users in under three weeks, but memecoins account for 80% of its $9B DEX volume, FalconX says.

title: CoinShares launches UCITS platform targeting Europe’s institutional investors
summary: CoinShares is expanding into Europe's $30 trillion UCITS ecosystem with the launch of a new platform and a Bitcoin Mining ETF.

title: Trump prepares fresh tariff barrage with 10% levies set to expire
summary: US president to renew trade war after Supreme Court threw out reciprocal duties

title: US to hit Canada with 50% tariffs on wide range of goods
summary: Washington accuses neighbour of engaging in unfair practices in move that could reignite trade war
